content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Frances H. Arnold, George P. Smith, and Sir Gregory P. Winter for their work on the directed evolution of enzymes and phage display of peptides and antibodies. Arnold was recognized for her pioneering work in enzyme engineering, while Smith and Winter were honored for their contributions to using bacteriophage evolution to develop new proteins.
